title: Sewing Machine for Beginners – Portable Electric with 12 Built-In Stitch Patterns, 6 Presser Feet, Foot Pedal, 2-Speed Control, Fast Sewing for Clothes, Fabrics, DIY & Home Use
features: ⚠️ Warning: Always switch off the automatic sewing function before connecting to the mains. Failure to do so may cause the machine to start operating immediately when plugged in.

⚡ Dual-Control Sewing with Adjustable Speeds – Enjoy flexible sewing with both foot pedal and push-button operation. Push-button mode offers two convenient speeds (low/high), while the foot pedal allows gradual speed control. Perfect for precise stitching on delicate or thicker fabrics, helping beginners and experts sew with confidence.

🧵 12 Built-in Stitch Patterns & Reverse Function – Create a variety of stitches, including straight (1–4), decorative (5–6), buttonhole (7–8), and overlock (9–12). Easily select your pattern with the dial and use the reverse button to reinforce seams for strong, professional-quality results every time.

✂️ Beginner-Friendly Design – Clear threading guides and double-needle stitching make setup simple. Step-by-step video tutorials and the included manual help beginners start quickly while offering versatile sewing options for advanced users, making sewing enjoyable and stress-free.

👚 Adjustable Tension & Powerful Performance – Customise stitch quality with 1–9 thread tension settings. Built-in LED light illuminates your workspace, and the machine can handle up to six layers of fabric. Compact and lightweight, perfect for home use, DIY projects, and travel.

🧰 Complete Multi-Function Kit – Includes 5 specialized presser feet, 1 universal foot, 1 twin needle, 5 spare needles, and a thread kit. Tackle everything from basic seams to buttonholes, zippers, hems, and decorative stitching with ease. (Factory-threaded with test cloth included, not a used product.)
